title: Treasure Chest
entries: The treasure is enclosed by a {table:gm/loot/chest-style} chest made of {table:gm/loot/chest-material}. The trim and hinges are {table:gm/loot/chest-trim}. The craftsman left a mark: {table:gm/loot/chest-mark}. Carelessness will trigger {table:gm/loot/chest-trap}. To get past the {table:gm/loot/chest-lock}, one would need the key — currently {table:gm/loot/chest-key}.
